decision.summary: Close the stopped-out 66k dip Yes remainder and open a new 67k reach Yes position for the corrective rebound thesis.
decision.rationale: The existing `will-bitcoin-dip-to-66k-on-march-28` `Yes` position is now at 13.5% probability, below the playbook stop-loss threshold, so the remaining position should be closed. Updated Beecthor context keeps the broader bias bearish but favors a short-term wave 2/corrective rebound first, with upside targets around 67.890, 68.653, 69.424, and potentially higher before the larger drop resumes; Binance supports that execution reality with BTC at 66566.17 and positive short-term structure. Under nearest-strike-first, the closest upside market is `will-bitcoin-reach-67k-on-march-29`, and its 72.4% probability sits in the preferred range while aligning with the current corrective-bounce thesis.
